title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 52.
content:
There was an Old Man of Peru,
    Who watched his wife making a stew;
    But once by mistake,
    In a stove she did bake,
    That unfortunate Man of Peru.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 52." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
